use anyhow::{Context, Result};
use std::path::Path;

pub fn load_dataset(path: &Path, name: &str) -> Result<DataFrame> {
    let bytes = std::fs::read(path)
        .context(format!("failed to read dataset '{}' from {}", name, path.display()))?;
    let df = parse_csv(&bytes)
        .context(format!("failed to parse CSV for dataset '{}'", name))?;
    Ok(df)
}

pub fn connect_to_shard(host: &str, port: u16, shard_id: u32) -> Result<Connection> {
    let conn = tcp_connect(host, port)
        .context(format!("connecting to shard {shard_id} at {host}:{port}"))?;
    Ok(conn)
}

fn parse_csv(_bytes: &[u8]) -> Result<DataFrame> {
    todo!()
}

fn tcp_connect(_host: &str, _port: u16) -> Result<Connection> {
    todo!()
}

struct DataFrame;
struct Connection;
